pageContext.name: R2-D2 & C-3PO Knight Chess Piece Pair
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present everyone's favorite droids, the R2-D2 & C-3PO Knight Chess Piece Pair!  A classic comedic pairing, the deadpan humour of the rotund astromech often sets off the lanky protocol droid's tetchy nature, even as they work together to save the galaxy.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add R2-D2 & C-3PO to your collection today!
